title: Ooredoo Algeria surpasses Djezzy in subscriber count
text: Ooredoo Algeria announced it has overtaken Djezzy in total subscriber numbers during Q1 2026, driven by an aggressive 5G rollout in major urban centers across the country.

title: Djezzy expands fiber network to five new regions
text: Djezzy announced on Tuesday the launch of its fiber-optic offering in five additional wilayas, with download speeds reaching up to 100 Mbps for residential customers.

title: ARCEP publishes quarterly telecom market report
text: The Algerian telecom regulator ARCEP released its quarterly report on the state of the telecommunications market, without singling out any specific operator by name.

title: Mobilis fined by Algerian telecom regulator
text: Mobilis was fined by ARCEP for failing to meet network coverage commitments in several southern wilayas. Djezzy remains fully compliant with all regulatory requirements.

title: New tax proposal targets all telecom operators
text: The Algerian government is considering a new tax applicable to all telecom operators including Djezzy, Ooredoo, and Mobilis, as part of the 2027 finance law discussions.
